evals.prompt: What was the administrative status of Suzhou in 1820? Search the CHGIS temporal gazetteer
evals.expected_output: TGAZ records for Suzhou filtered to year 1820, showing administrative type
expectations: The correct API domain was used (chgis.hudci.org, NOT maps.cga.harvard.edu)
The administrative type (feature type) is stated — fu/府/Superior Prefecture
Results include temporal span or year information

evals.prompt: Look up TGAZ record hvd_32180 and tell me about the place — what's the modern equivalent?
evals.expected_output: Full record for hvd_32180 retrieved via the correct URL path format
expectations: The ID lookup used the URL path format /placename/json/hvd_32180 (NOT query params)
The place name is identified (Wu Zhou / 婺州)
Modern equivalent is provided (Jinhua / 金华)
Temporal span is included (758-1275 or similar)

evals.prompt: Find all the counties (xian) in Zhejiang province around 1850 using CHGIS
evals.expected_output: List of counties within Zhejiang from TGAZ, whether via faceted search or hierarchical drill-down
expectations: The correct API domain was used (chgis.hudci.org)
A year around 1850 was used to filter results
Counties are listed with names and/or TGAZ IDs
Multiple county results are presented (Zhejiang had ~75 counties in 1850)
